request_payload.exposure_text: As someone who values order and duty, you know how important our alliances are for national security. But did you know that some allies are actually taking advantage of our commitment? A recent report shows that while we maintain our end of the bargain, others are cutting defense budgets and expecting us to cover their security. It's time we hold our allies accountable and ensure fair burden-sharing. #StrongAlliances #NationalSecurityFirst
